name: The Nanny
overview: That flashy girl from Flushing with the heart of an angel (and the voice of a slighty more nasal angel). The comic misadventures of the sweet and sassy Fran Fine, her sophisticated employer, Broadway producer Mr. Sheffield, his boisterous brood and his wisecracking staff.

trailers.title: The Nanny (2/2) Mr. Sheffield's Grandmother Gets Pushed Around
Fran and Max: Will They Won't They?
